channel.title: Strapi on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Strapi on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Strapi vs Directus vs Ghost: Best Self-Hosted Headless CMS 2026
item.description: If you are building a modern web application, mobile app, or multi-channel digital product, you have probably hit the same wall: your content needs a home, but traditional monolithic CMS platforms tie you to their front-end rendering engine. A headless CMS decouples content management from content delivery, serving structured data through APIs so your front end can be anything — a React app, a mobile application, a static site, or even a digital signage display.
